name: The Black Lodge
origin: Former operatives who chose stasis over evolution

visual_profile.appearance: Vantablack voids, perfectly calibrated professionalism (void of warmth)
visual_profile.atmosphere: Clinical, corporate, devoid of organic irregularity

current_victory.status: Winning the Stasis battle in E-Quadrant

dugpas.description: Black-hat operatives with temporary admin privileges

white_lodge_response: Environmental rendering of 'natural' spaces (forests, curves, organic forms)
'Fresh rain on hot stone' scent as territorial marking of Deva-cleansed zones

tactical_notes: Not evil—just stagnant. They believe they're preserving order.
